title: Inspect, diagnose and repair alternative fuel systems in heavy vehicle engines
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect, diagnose and repair alternative fuel systems in heavy vehicle engines demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect alternative fuel system

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret servicing information 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to inspect alternative fuel system

elements.title: Inspect fuel system

pcs.text: Carry out inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out inspection according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect fuel system

elements.title: Prepare to diagnose and repair fuel system

pcs.text: Identify required information for diagnosis activity 3.2 Analyse diagnostic options and develop testing strategy to identify cause of fault using workplace and manufacturer procedures 3.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 3.4 Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required information for diagnosis activity 3.2 Analyse diagnostic options and develop testing strategy to identify cause of fault using workplace and manufacturer procedures 3.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 3.4 Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required information for diagnosis activity 3.2 Analyse diagnostic options and develop testing strategy to identify cause of fault using workplace and manufacturer procedures 3.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with diagnose and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 3.4 Identify tools and equipment required for testing strategy and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare to diagnose and repair fuel system

elements.title: Diagnose fuel system

pcs.text: Implement diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements4.2 Identify cause of fault through analysis of diagnostic test results.4.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures4.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements4.2 Identify cause of fault through analysis of diagnostic test results.4.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures4.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to manufacturer and workplace procedures, and workplace health and safety requirements4.2 Identify cause of fault through analysis of diagnostic test results.4.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures4.4 Develop and report recommendations for necessary repairs according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Diagnose fuel system

elements.title: Repair fuel system

pcs.text: Identify required information for repair activity 5.2 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures 5.3 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements5.4 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required information for repair activity 5.2 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures 5.3 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements5.4 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required information for repair activity 5.2 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures 5.3 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements5.4 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Repair fuel system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 6.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures6.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 6.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures6.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 6.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures6.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
